name: brain care + j/d rice & turkey entrée dog food
description: as dogs age, many may start to show behaviors associated with cognitive decline, such as house soiling, disrupted sleep patterns, loss of memory and reduced social interaction. improving these behaviors can be as easy as feeding the right nutrition early on and consistently. rich in antioxidants to combat signs of brain aging high levels of omega-3 fatty acids including dha, essential to brain health enriched with omega-3 fatty acids, glucosamine & chondroitin sulfate
